title: Alter table to add Fkey....
poc: create table t2 (id int , name varchar(1024), CONSTRAINT pk_t2_id PRIMARY KEY (id));
create table t3 (age int , address int, CONSTRAINT pk_t3_age PRIMARY KEY (age));
create table t1 (id int , age int);
alter table t1 add constraint fk_t1_id_t2_id FOREIGN key(id) references t2(id);
alter table t1 add constraint fk_t1_age_t3_age FOREIGN key(age) references t3(age);
key_bug_features: Adding foreign key constraints to existing tables
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t4 (id int, description varchar(512), CONSTRAINT pk_t4_id PRIMARY KEY (id));
CREATE TABLE t5 (ref_id int, value float, CONSTRAINT pk_t5_ref_id PRIMARY KEY (ref_id));
ALTER TABLE t5 ADD CONSTRAINT fk_t5_ref_id_t4_id FOREIGN KEY(ref_id) REFERENCES t4(id);
